prompt: Add a colorful gradient background to the search results area for a modern look.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply a vibrant, colorful gradient background to the entire search results display area. This area spans from directly below the 'WEB' / 'IMAGES' / 'VIDEOS' / 'MORE' tabs down to the bottom edge of the visible content, just above the black Android navigation bar, to achieve a modern aesthetic.
